quotes.quote: Compare yourself to who you were yesterday, not to who someone else is today.
quotes.why_they_said_it: Comparison to others produces resentment; comparison to past self produces motivation.

quotes.quote: Life is suffering. That is not pessimistic — it is factual. The question is whether your suffering will be meaningful.
quotes.why_they_said_it: He builds his framework on the observation that suffering is unavoidable.

quotes.quote: If you cannot bring peace to your household, how dare you try to save the world?
quotes.why_they_said_it: Consistent critique of prioritising activism over personal responsibility.
